title: Building a dynamic personal site with Antigravity and Gemma 4
summary: Rody Davis demonstrated using Antigravity and Gemma to build a serverless, VS Code-styled website generator with theme switching and offline vector search. Gemma summarizes posts and embedding-gemma vectorizes content at compile time to serve dynamic recommendations without internet connectivity.
writeup: Rody Davis builds a serverless personal site generator styled after VS Code, using Antigravity and Gemma to add theme switching and offline vector search. At compile time, Gemma summarizes posts and embedding-gemma vectorizes the content, so the site serves dynamic recommendations without an internet connection. The demonstration shows local inference and embeddings driving HTML generation, keeping recommendation logic entirely client-side and offline-capable.
